title: payena microphylla
intro: Payena microphylla, also known as the Payena or Malayan Payena, is a species of plant in the family Sapotaceae, native to Southeast Asia. Payena microphylla has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Payena microphylla include its ability to aid in the treatment of fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to support immune system function. Payena microphylla can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and is often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
